value: Sources/Demo/DemoApp.swift exists but is NOT a Package.swift target — `swift build` and `swift test` only touch the SeaBearKit library and SeaBearKitTests. DemoApp uses `@main` and imports SeaBearKit; it's intended to be opened in Xcode (likely via a separate project or Canvas previews). Do not assume `swift build` exercises Demo code, and don't add code there expecting CI to catch it.
